---
title: "Portfolio for R computational course for Biologists and Chemistry"
author: Tymesha Bovell
date: 05/07/2026
---

## Table of Contents:


- [Cleaning and Wrangling Data](assignments/A03.html)
- [Tidy Data and Joins](assignments/A04.html)
- [Working with Spatial Data and Visualization](assignments/intro-to-spatial-data.html)
